lessons.title: Greetings and Personal Information
objectives: Identify common greetings and farewells
Exchange personal information such as name, age, and nationality
lessons.experiment: Flashcard Trainer: Flip cards to learn daily vocabulary (Greetings, Family, School) with visual and audio cues.

lessons.title: Home, School and Shopping
objectives: Describe items in the home and school
Ask for prices and quantities in a shopping context
lessons.experiment: Flashcard Trainer: Master vocabulary for clothes and food using an interactive flip-card system.

lessons.title: Nouns, Articles, and Adjectives
objectives: Apply rules of gender and number to nouns and articles
Ensure adjective agreement with nouns
lessons.experiment: Verb Conjugation Lab: Drag endings to match subjects for regular -AR, -ER, and -IR verbs in the present tense.

lessons.title: Verb Tenses: Past, Present, and Future
objectives: Conjugate verbs in the preterite and imperfect tenses
Form sentences in the future tense
lessons.experiment: Verb Conjugation Lab: Practice past and future tense conjugations by dragging the correct suffixes onto verb stems.

lessons.title: Understanding Short Passages
objectives: Extract specific information from short texts
Identify main ideas in Spanish passages
lessons.experiment: Dialogue Builder: Drag and drop phrases to reconstruct a logical conversation based on a short reading prompt.

lessons.title: Interpreting Public Signs and Notices
objectives: Identify the meaning of signs, advertisements, and announcements
Deduce intended audience and purpose
concepts: Vocabulary for travel and public places
lessons.experiment: Dialogue Builder: Create a conversation between a traveler and a station agent using phrases from public notices.

lessons.title: Letter and Email Writing
objectives: Compose informal letters and emails
Use appropriate greetings and closings
lessons.experiment: Dialogue Builder: Drag phrases to build an email response to a friend's invitation.

lessons.title: Short Essays and Narratives
objectives: Write short paragraphs describing events
Use different tenses to narrate a story
lessons.experiment: Dialogue Builder: Organize sentences to create a cohesive narrative about a past holiday.

lessons.title: Role-Play Scenarios
objectives: Participate in simulated dialogues in everyday situations
Use common conversational fillers and phrases
lessons.experiment: Dialogue Builder: Complete role-play scripts for a doctor's visit and a restaurant scenario by dragging the correct responses.

lessons.title: Pronunciation and Fluency
objectives: Apply rules of Spanish pronunciation and stress
Communicate clearly in common social interactions
lessons.experiment: Flashcard Trainer: Listen to native pronunciations and match them with written phrases and meanings.

lessons.title: Festivals and Traditions
objectives: Identify major Hispanic festivals (e.g., Día de los Muertos, Las Fallas)
Understand Caribbean Spanish traditions
lessons.experiment: Flashcard Trainer: Explore cultural symbols and festival names using an interactive deck.

lessons.title: Caribbean Spanish and Notable Figures
objectives: Recognize variations in Spanish spoken in the Caribbean
Identify notable figures in Hispanic history and arts
lessons.experiment: Dialogue Builder: Match famous quotes from notable Hispanic figures to the person who said them.
